title: Uruguayan Chwinamul Fritters with Springy Twist
description: A delicious twist on traditional Uruguayan fritters using rich and springy ingredients.

ingredients.name: All-purpose gluten-free flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a gluten-free option

instructions: 1. Rinse the Chwinamul leaves and pat them dry.
2. In a bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, ricotta cheese, spring onion, egg, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Add the Chwinamul leaves to the bowl and mix until they are evenly distributed.
4. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small fritters.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
6. When the oil is hot, add the fritters and fry until they are golden brown.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
